mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mydata_card_transactions ( fin_id, card_id2, user_id, card_name, res_used_date, res_used_time, res_card_no, res_card_no1, res_card_name, res_member_store_name, res_used_amount, res_payment_type, res_installment_month, res_approval_no, res_payment_due_date, res_home_foreign_type, res_member_store_corp_no, res_member_store_type, res_member_store_tel_no, res_member_store_addr, res_member_store_no, res_cancel_yn, res_cancel_amount, res_vat, res_cash_back, res_krw_amt, comm_start_date, comm_end_date, res_account_currency, created_time, last_modified_time ) VALUES ( #{finId}, #{cardId2}, #{userId}, #{cardName}, #{resUsedDate}, #{resUsedTime}, #{resCardNo}, #{resCardNo1}, #{resCardName}, #{resMemberStoreName}, #{resUsedAmount}, #{resPaymentType}, #{resInstallmentMonth}, #{resApprovalNo}, #{resPaymentDueDate}, #{resHomeForeignType}, #{resMemberStoreCorpNo}, #{resMemberStoreType}, #{resMemberStoreTelNo}, #{resMemberStoreAddr}, #{resMemberStoreNo}, #{resCancelYn}, #{resCancelAmount}, #{resVat}, #{resCashBack}, #{resKrwAmt}, #{commStartDate}, #{commEndDate}, #{resAccountCurrency}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT transaction_id, fin_id, card_id2, user_id, card_name, res_used_date, res_used_time, res_card_no, res_card_no1, res_card_name, res_member_store_name, res_used_amount, res_payment_type, res_installment_month, res_approval_no, res_payment_due_date, res_home_foreign_type, res_member_store_corp_no, res_member_store_type, res_member_store_tel_no, res_member_store_addr, res_member_store_no, res_cancel_yn, res_cancel_amount, res_vat, res_cash_back, res_krw_amt, comm_start_date, comm_end_date, res_account_currency, created_time, last_modified_time FROM mydata_card_transactions WHERE user_id = #{param1} AND fin_id = ( SELECT fin_id FROM mydata_card_holdings WHERE holding_id = #{param2} ) ORDER BY res_used_date DESC, res_used_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE mydata_card_transactions SET res_member_store_type = #{category}, last_modified_time = NOW() WHERE transaction_id = #{transactionId}
mapper.select: SELECT transaction_id, fin_id, card_id2, user_id, card_name, res_used_date, res_used_time, res_card_no, res_card_no1, res_card_name, res_member_store_name, res_used_amount, res_payment_type, res_installment_month, res_approval_no, res_payment_due_date, res_home_foreign_type, res_member_store_corp_no, res_member_store_type, res_member_store_tel_no, res_member_store_addr, res_member_store_no, res_cancel_yn, res_cancel_amount, res_vat, res_cash_back, res_krw_amt, comm_start_date, comm_end_date, res_account_currency, created_time, last_modified_time FROM mydata_card_transactions WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND (res_member_store_type IS NULL OR res_member_store_type = '') ORDER BY res_used_date DESC, res_used_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE mydata_card_transactions SET res_member_store_type = #{category}, last_modified_time = NOW() WHERE res_member_store_name = #{merchantName} AND (res_member_store_type IS NULL OR res_member_store_type = '')
